mapper.select: SELECT card_no, level, name, gender, address, company, phone, email, motto, reg_date, total_spent FROM member WHERE card_no = #{cardNo}
SELECT card_no, level, name, gender, address, company, phone, email, motto, reg_date, total_spent FROM member
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (card_no, level, name, gender, address, company, phone, email, motto, reg_date, total_spent) VALUES (#{cardNo}, #{level}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{address}, #{company}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{motto}, #{regDate}, #{totalSpent})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET level = #{level} WHERE card_no = #{cardNo}
UPDATE member SET total_spent = #{totalSpent} WHERE card_no = #{cardNo}
